entries.source: "Create geography flashcards"
entries.value: "Opret flashcards om geografi"

entries.source: "Make flashcards for mitosis"
entries.value: "Lav flashcards om mitose"

entries.source: "Turn this note into Q&A"
entries.value: "Gør denne note til spørgsmål og svar"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Flashcard Builder on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: En praktisk guide til at bruge Flashcard-bygger på inspir til øvelses læring, med prompter, studieloops og sikrere AI-vaner.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: En stærkere studieloop

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn notes or topics into clear flashcards with answers, traps, and review prompts.
entries.value: AI-flashcard-bygger til aktiv genkaldelse er en fokuseret måde at bruge AI til læring på i stedet for passiv indsamling af svar. Tilstanden er bygget omkring en bestemt opgave: Gør noter eller emner til tydelige flashcards med svar, fælder og repetitionsprompter.

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall: practical guide
entries.value: AI-flashcard-bygger til aktiv genkaldelse: praktisk guide

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-vejleder

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Be om et lille første trin i stilet for et endeligt svar.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Be AI’en kontroller dit ræsonnement, ikke bara resultatet.

entries.source: Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: Kortene spørger om én ting ad gangiven og indeholder fælder, så repetitionen opbygger førståelse, ikke bare genkendelse.

entries.source: Create recall cards.
entries.value: Skab genkaldelseskort.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Afslut gennem at skrive tilbage idéen fra hukommelsen.

entries.source: Flashcard Builder
entries.value: Flashcard-bygger

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Træn

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompter at prøve

entries.source: Reveal answers when ready.
entries.value: Vis svar natr du er klar.

entries.source: Review misses sooner.
entries.value: Repeter fejl tidligere.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Flashcard Builder. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Memory Palace. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Start live-tilstanden ved Flashcard-bygger. Hvis du vil have et nærliggende læringsformat, kan du prøve Hukommelsespalads. For et bredere blik på platformen kan du læse, hvad en AI-læringsmakker bør gøre for alle.

entries.source: Students preparing for exams, language learners, and anyone using retrieval practice.
entries.value: Studerende der forbereder sig til eksamen, sprogelever og alle, der bruger aktiv genkaldelse.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell tilstand hvad du er prøver at lær eller produsere.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference viser up in flow. Instead of ett giant response, beste sessioner gat gennem en loop: set en matl, prøv noe, get tilbakemelding, reparer svag spot, og velg næste action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matematikmatikrs. En general chatbot kan svar almost anything, but en læringstilstand gives samtale en shape. Det nudges du toward typen thinAIng, øvelse, tilbakemelding, eller exploration som hjælper idé stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: This er samme habit behind studying med AI uden cheating dig selv: hold elev active. AI er most nyttig natr det gives du tilbakemelding on din thinAIng.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Denne tilstanden er spesielt nyttig for elever som vil:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Prøv trinet med egne ord.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Brug Flashcard-bygger, når du vil have en session, der starter hurtigt, men stadig tilpasser sig dig. Det første mål er ikke at lyde imponerende. Det første mål er at få næste skridt til at føles muligt.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hvad denne tilstanden hjælper med

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Hvor du gatr videre

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Du kan also start med en rough version of din ekte problem. En messy første prompt er fine. session kan clarify nivat, matlgruppe, frist, og style once du begin.
